---
title: "Tableau Workshop 2023"
source: "Workshop Material"
author: "Kevin McCarthy, Martha Davis"
institution: "Baker University"
competency: [Data Visualization, Dashboard]
tech-lang: [Tableau]
main-format: [MSWord, Data, PPT Slide]
toc: true
toc-title: "On this page"
---

## Material Description

Introductory workshop demonstrating how to build visualizations using Tableau. Slide deck, teaching notes, and the data set are provided.

## Module Materials

You can access the material [here](https://github.com/KansasData/Module/tree/main/Baker_McCarthy_Davis_Tableau_Demo_workshop)

This Material is under the [CC BY-NC-SA license](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-nc-sa/4.0/deed.en)
